Direct website verification - URL is active and accessible with correct episode content

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims reference the real, publicly available first episode of Serial podcast (2014). Episode 'The Alibi' was released on October 3, 2014, hosted by Sarah Koenig, from the series Serial. Originally produced by WBEZ Chicago in collaboration with This American Life, the podcast launched the true-crime/investigative journalism podcast genre. The episode is available on major platforms (Apple Podcasts, Spotify) and the official serialpodcast.org website. Running time approximately 53-54 minutes. The URL https://serialpodcast.org/season-one/1/the-alibi is the official episode page.
